ocr_findings.description: Memory hierarchy diagram (メモリの種類) is a structured tree graphic with boxes and connecting lines (RAM→DRAM/SRAM, ROM→マスクROM/PROM/EPROM/EEPROM→フラッシュメモリ) plus color-coded annotations (揮発性/不揮発性/リフレッシュ必要/不要/読み出しのみ/書き込み可/紫外線でデータを消去/電気でデータを消去). OCR renders this as a placeholder image tag with no text content — all branch labels lost.
Section marker '○●' for RAMとは rendered as mixed symbol; minor cosmetic issue
OCR line 23: '電源が切れるときデータが消滅' — image reads '電源が切れるとデータが消滅'; extraneous 'き' inserted

reviewer_notes: Main prose text (メモリの種類 introduction, RAMとROMの違い, RAMとは section) is well captured. The key issue is the memory classification tree diagram: all branch-level label text is lost in OCR (rendered as image only). This is a med-severity loss since the tree encodes the RAM/ROM taxonomy that is core exam content. Body paragraphs below the diagram are intact.
